testcases.description: Verify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01 Situation Header UI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal.kitaboo. com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display
